name: Teleporter
flavor: Objects module. Place on the table or on scenery (the whole object then carries this power). Activate when YOUR Little Soldier ends a Move in contact and no opponent is also touching it.
summary: Place your Little Soldier in contact with any other Teleporter in play (even one an opponent is touching). This immediately ends your Move. A Grenade die or Mortar token touching a Teleporter may be teleported just before it explodes.

effects.text: Relocate to any other Teleporter in play; ends the Move.
